hero.headline: We Are the Core From Which Your Digital Product Is Built
hero.subtitle: We craft unforgettable digital experiences — from design to launch, every step with precision and professionalism.

about.body: Nawah isn't just a development studio — we are the core around which your digital business orbits. We believe every successful digital product starts from a solid center: clear vision, precise design, and unbreakable code. That's what we build for every client.

1.title: Discovery
1.body: We sit with you and understand your project from the inside out. Your goals, your audience, your competitors. We don't start until we understand everything.

2.title: Design
2.body: We translate understanding into visual experience. Interfaces that impress, flows that persuade, identity that distinguishes.

3.title: Development
3.body: We build what we designed with clean, fast, and secure code. Admin panel, payment integration, responsive on every screen.

4.title: Launch & Support
4.body: We launch with you, not hand off and leave. Continuous technical support, updates, and ongoing development.

web.title: Website Design & Development
web.body: We design and build websites that attract visitors and convert them into clients. From a captivating interface to an admin panel that simplifies your life.

app.title: App Development
app.body: iOS and Android apps that give your customers an unforgettable seamless experience — fast, beautiful, and error-free.

sw.title: Software & Systems
sw.body: Custom systems to manage your business: inventory, orders, reports, employees. Everything in one place, controlled with a tap.

admin.title: Integrated Admin Dashboard
admin.body: You don't need a developer to update your site. Add a product, change a price, or publish news from a simple control panel designed specifically for you.

pay.title: E-Payment Integration
pay.body: Accept your customers' payments professionally. We integrate payment gateways suited to your market with complete security and a smooth buyer experience.

support.title: Ongoing Post-Launch Support
support.body: We don't disappear after launch. Our team is available to solve any problem, apply any update, and answer every question.

social.title: Social Media Integration
social.body: Link your site to Instagram, WhatsApp, and TikTok seamlessly. Every interaction in its right place without any effort.

speed.title: Speed & Professionalism
speed.body: We work seriously without procrastination. Your project deserves full attention from day one to the last line of code.

rtl.title: Full Arabic & RTL Support
rtl.body: Our sites work in Arabic just as well as in English — professional Arabic fonts and correct right-to-left layout.

resp.title: Fully Responsive Design
resp.body: Your site looks perfect on mobile, tablet, and laptop. No compromises, no shortcuts.

seo.title: Built-in SEO Optimization
seo.body: We build your site so search engines find it easily. More visibility = more customers.

testi.title: What Our Clients Say
testi.subtitle: Every word below comes from a real partnership built from the core.

1.quote: We aspire to be the number one technology and development company in Syria.
1.name: Abdulrahman Al-Ladhiqani

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What exactly do I get when I order a website from Nawah?
faq.a1: You get a website fully designed for your project, with a control panel that lets you manage content yourself, and clean code that you own. Includes: professional design, bilingual content if needed, social media integration, and one month of free technical support after launch.
faq.q2: How long does it take to build a website?
faq.a2: It depends on the project size. A simple site may take two weeks. A full e-commerce site may need a month or more. We set the timeline with you from the start and stick to it.
faq.a3: Every project is unique, and the price depends on your exact needs. Contact us via WhatsApp and tell us about your project — we'll send you a detailed quote for free within 24 hours.
faq.q4: Can I update the site myself after receiving it?
faq.a4: Yes — this is one of our top priorities. We integrate a simple control panel that lets you edit text, add products, and upload images without any technical knowledge.
faq.q5: What happens after the website launches?
faq.a5: We provide one month of free technical support. After that, you can subscribe to a monthly maintenance plan, or contact us for each request individually. We don't abandon you.
faq.q6: Do you support Arabic websites with right-to-left layout?
faq.a6: Absolutely. All our sites fully support Arabic — professional Arabic fonts, correct RTL layout, and a completely natural user experience.
faq.q7: Does the website work perfectly on mobile?
faq.a7: Yes. Every site we build is designed mobile-first, then for larger screens. We test it on multiple devices before delivery.

footer.tagline: From the core — everything is built.

port.title: What We've Built
port.subtitle: Every project here was built with the same precision we promise you.

pk.desc: A complete website for Pizza Khanum restaurant — modern design, smooth ordering experience, and a bilingual interface that authentically reflects the restaurant's identity.

ab.title: About Us
ab.subtitle: A small agency with limitless ambition.

story.title: How Nawah Started
story.p1: Nawah was born from a simple observation: the Syrian market needs a digital development company that delivers global quality with deep local understanding.
story.p2: Just as the atomic nucleus contains all the energy of the atom, we believe every successful digital product needs a solid core: clear vision, precise design, and code that endures. We are that core.
story.p3: We aspire to be the number one digital development company in Syria — not through claims, but through work and results.

ab.pullquote: Like the nucleus at the heart of matter — we are the center from which your digital world is built.

vision.title: Our Vision & Mission
vision.label: Vision
vision.body: To be the number one digital development company in Syria — the reference that business owners turn to when they want a digital presence worthy of their ambitions.

mission.label: Mission
mission.body: To transform our clients' ideas into world-class digital products — with design that dazzles, code that endures, and support that never stops.

1.title: Excellence
1.body: We refuse the ordinary. Every project we deliver represents the highest standard we can achieve.

2.title: Innovation
2.body: We always seek the smartest solution, not the easiest. Creativity isn't an option — it's our way of working.

3.title: Reliability
3.body: Our deadlines are promises. Our clients know that what we commit to will arrive on time and at quality.

4.title: Partnership
4.body: We're not vendors — we're partners. Your project's success is our success, and its failure keeps us up at night just as it does you.

1.body: Establish Nawah as a trusted name in Syria's digital development market.

2.body: Launch 20+ successful digital products for clients across various sectors.

3.body: Expand toward the broader Arab market — same quality, wider reach.

4.body: Be the nucleus around which the region's digital transformation orbits.

cta.title: Ready to Build Your Digital Product?
cta.body: Let us be the core from which everything begins.

404.title: This Page Has Lost Its Orbit
404.body: But the nucleus is still here. Let us bring you back to the center.
